houseStyles.name: Plein-air tonal oil
houseStyles.description: painted as a small late-19th-century plein-air oil sketch on panel — somber muted tonal palette of olive green, ochre, slate grey, umber and warm stone, soft grey overcast sky, heavy textured impasto and visible directional palette-knife strokes, low contrast, restrained and atmospheric, antique muted panel finish

houseStyles.name: Nostalgic Glow
houseStyles.description: rendered with a nostalgic, sun-faded vintage quality — deep moody shadows pooling in the corners and background, contrasted against soft, bright, airy pockets of glowing light breaking through, warm sepia-tinged color grading, gentle film grain, soft-focus romantic haze, evokes a cherished old photograph or a half-remembered summer afternoon, dramatic chiaroscuro balanced by luminous highlight blooms, warm faded patina

houseStyles.name: Abstract art
houseStyles.description: Modern abstract wall art featuring expressive organic shapes, layered brushstrokes, softly blended color fields, subtle visual texture, balanced asymmetrical composition, contemporary gallery aesthetic, sophisticated color harmony, painterly depth, clean negative space, and an upscale interior-design feel.

wildcardPresets.name: Japandi
wildcardPresets.layer: matte minimalist, warm neutral palette (oatmeal, clay, soft black), negative space, natural light, fine grain, calm

wildcardPresets.name: Vintage botanical
wildcardPresets.layer: Botanical wall art consistently appears across Etsy bestseller searches, including fern sets, wildflower illustrations, vintage herbarium prints, watercolor bouquets, floral line drawings, and modern botanical designs. One visible botanical set showed more than 5,000 reviews, while a vintage French-country set showed over 35,000.

wildcardPresets.name: Mid-century abstract
wildcardPresets.layer: bold geometric shapes, 1950s palette (mustard, teal, burnt orange, cream), flat matte color, clean hard edges

wildcardPresets.name: Moody coastal
wildcardPresets.layer: soft fog, low-contrast desaturated blue-greys, atmospheric depth, film-grain, quiet horizon

wildcardPresets.name: Scandinavian line
wildcardPresets.layer: single-weight continuous line art, off-white ground, charcoal line, airy, lots of breathing room

wildcardPresets.name: Dark academia
wildcardPresets.layer: oil-painting richness, deep umbers and forest greens, chiaroscuro lighting, classical, aged varnish

wildcardPresets.name: Desert modern
wildcardPresets.layer: warm terracotta & sand, high sun, long soft shadows, organic curves, sun-bleached matte finish

wildcardPresets.name: Dreamy pastel
wildcardPresets.layer: soft gradients, blush/lavender/mint, gentle bloom, low contrast, ethereal

wildcardPresets.name: Bold graphic
wildcardPresets.layer: high-contrast poster style, limited 3-color palette, strong silhouette, screen-print texture

wildcardPresets.name: Watercolor
wildcardPresets.layer: Traditional watercolor painting with transparent layers of hand-applied pigments, soft flowing washes, delicate color transitions, subtle wet-on-wet blending, expressive brushstrokes, organic paint blooms, feathered edges, natural granulation, and visible cold-pressed watercolor paper texture. The artwork has luminous colors created through transparent glazing rather than opaque paint, producing a light, airy, handcrafted appearance with soft atmospheric depth and gentle imperfections.

wildcardPresets.name: Minimalist Botanical
wildcardPresets.layer: Clean, airy plant or flower art with simple stems, leaves, olive branches, ferns, or pressed-flower silhouettes. Popular for bedrooms, bathrooms, nurseries, and modern neutral homes. Etsy’s own marketplace language connects this style with serene decor, delicate pressed flowers, abstract leaves, and tranquil olive branches

wildcardPresets.name: Vintage Landscape
wildcardPresets.layer: Frame TV Art Keywords: vintage landscape art, Frame TV art, moody landscape print, antique wall art, digital download TV art

wildcardPresets.name: Abstract
wildcardPresets.layer: Modern abstract wall art featuring expressive organic shapes, layered brushstrokes, softly blended color fields, subtle visual texture, balanced asymmetrical composition, contemporary gallery aesthetic, sophisticated color harmony, painterly depth, clean negative space, and an upscale interior-design feel.

wildcardPresets.name: Vintage Wall Art
wildcardPresets.layer: Vintage European oil painting inspired by nineteenth-century fine art, with softly aged pigments, visible painterly brushwork, muted earthy colors, gentle chiaroscuro lighting, atmospheric depth, slightly darkened varnish, romantic realism, antique canvas texture, and the appearance of a carefully preserved museum painting.

wildcardPresets.name: Minimalist
wildcardPresets.layer: Refined minimalist wall art using a limited color palette, clean geometric or organic forms, intentional negative space, simple balanced composition, understated texture, delicate visual rhythm, crisp edges, quiet sophistication, and a calm contemporary gallery aesthetic.

wildcardPresets.name: Mid-century modern
wildcardPresets.layer: Mid-century modern illustration inspired by 1950s and 1960s graphic design, featuring bold geometric forms, stylized organic shapes, simplified silhouettes, flat color blocking, mustard yellow, burnt orange, olive green, teal, and warm cream, subtle screen-print texture, playful balance, and a sophisticated retro composition.

wildcardPresets.name: Natural abstract art
wildcardPresets.layer: Sophisticated neutral abstract art composed of warm beige, ivory, taupe, sand, muted brown, charcoal, and soft greige, with layered organic forms, plaster-like texture, restrained brushwork, subtle tonal contrast, generous negative space, and a quiet-luxury interior aesthetic.

wildcardPresets.name: Landscape and Nature Art
wildcardPresets.layer: Atmospheric fine-art landscape featuring layered natural scenery, soft directional light, convincing depth, subtle mist, harmonious earth-toned colors, painterly foliage, carefully framed composition, serene mood, and a timeless connection to the outdoors.
